description_long: This object is a pair of glasses with a bold, angular frame featuring a geometric, almost faceted surface texture. The frame is full-rimmed, encircling the rectangular lens openings completely, and is relatively thick, giving it a sturdy and modern appearance. The temples are straight and robust, extending back with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is wide and flat, seamlessly connecting the two lens areas without any visible nose pads or additional support structures. The entire surface is covered in a vibrant, multicolored pattern with dominant shades of red, blue, green, and black, creating a striking and unconventional look. No visible brand logos or embellishments are present, and the lenses themselves appear to be absent or completely transparent.
description: A bold, angular pair of glasses with a thick, full-rimmed geometric frame and a vibrant multicolored pattern. The design is modern and striking, with rectangular lens openings and robust temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular lens openings, wide bridge, and the full-rimmed, faceted frame with its multicolored pattern.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the temples and the continuous geometric texture along the frame.
description_view_2: Oblique front view emphasizing the depth of the frame, the rectangular lens shapes, and the seamless connection between the bridge and the rims.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the inner curvature of the temples and the overall wraparound fit of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is angular and geometric with a full-rim structure, featuring thick, faceted surfaces and rectangular lens openings. The temples are straight and robust, curving slightly at the ends for a secure fit. The overall style is bold and modern, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: No visible lenses or tint; the lens areas appear empty or completely transparent.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is wide, flat, and integrated into the frame, connecting the two lens openings seamlessly without any visible nose pads or additional support.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thick and straight with a slight curve at the ends, matching the faceted, geometric texture of the frame. No engravings, patterns, or additional decorations are visible.
